## Problem

What workflow or operator problem should this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired behavior.

## Safety and compliance considerations

Does this touch voice consent, media retrieval, provider billing, cookies, API keys, or generated files?

## Alternatives considered

Describe any simpler or safer alternatives.
